SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO BEVERAGES DISTRIBUTION INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN VALEER VANLOO. DEFENDANT PROPER HOSPITALITY LLC DBA PROPER HOTEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAURE KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO BEVERAGES DISTRIBUTION INC DBA WATERLOO BEVERAGES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROPER HOSPITALITY LLC DBA PROPER HOTEL $6,071.76 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,161.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
